title: Eager Edge Destiny 2
description: A mod to add Eager Edge swords from Destiny 2 to Minecraft
body:
Adds Eager Edge swords from Destiny 2 to Minecraft


Features:

- Half Truths Sword
- Rare The Other Half Sword
- Right click to Eager swing (go far forwards)
- Left click a friendly mob or another player to send them flying
- Find them in a Pyramid structure spawns on End islands
- Swords can be repaired by Diamonds
- Cooldown Enchantment for Eager Swords
- Eager Edge can be combined with Elytra for extremely fast movement (Minecraft Wellskate👀)



Use /togglelaunch to disable/enable the ability to be launched by other players

I am new to this but if interest is shown in other versions I will try to make them
